description.value:
Send Prescription processing wijzigenTA building blocks for patient C van de XXX_Voortman
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 3 wijziging TA Wijziging toedieningsafspraak, met reden wijziging (stop-ta + nieuwe ta) en MVE<br style="font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px; background-color: #ffffff;">LET OP: wijziging toedieningsafspraak van scenario 3.5a
Send Prescription processing wijzigenTA resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '52272') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '106275') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '878421') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '43044') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '96938') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '373784005').where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1163094') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '52272') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '106275') ))).where((quantity.value = 28)).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '878421|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (PANTOZOL TABLET MSR 40MG)
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '52272|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (PANTOPRAZOL TABLET MSR 20MG)

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is Medication).where(code.where(coding.count() = 2 and coding.exists(system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' and code = '52272') and coding.exists(system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.1' and code = '106275'))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1163094|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (PANTOZOL TABLET MSR 20MG)
